raw_reaction: 正しいが、非相互作用Gibbs系という言い方は既存の大正準気体・Poisson分配関数・有限配置分配関数解とほぼ同じ内容だ。生涯忘れない別解とは言えない。
reason: The candidate correctly reads surviving prefixes as noninteracting finite configurations with partition function exp(1), but it is too close to existing grand-canonical gas, Poisson partition, and configuration partition-function solutions.
